<!-- Most PRs only need to touch src/rules/*.ts. Thank you! -->

## What does this PR do?


## Type
- [ ] Rule fix (selector / redirect in `src/rules/*.ts`)
- [ ] New site
- [ ] Engine / UI change (please link the issue you opened first)

## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm compile` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tested on a real page
- [ ] No legitimate content is hidden by mistake
- [ ] Engine untouched (for rule fixes)
